column1: JD-E4,Next.js Frontend Dashboard,Epic,"Scaffold the Next.js 16 frontend with standalone server config, full app router page structure, all MVP 1 components, and TanStack Query data fetching connected to the FastAPI backend.
JD-24,Next.js 16 scaffold,Task,"Scaffold frontend/ with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, MUI 7, TanStack Query v5, Zustand, and Zod.
- Set output: 'standalone' and reactStrictMode: true in next.config.ts — do NOT use output: 'export'
- Configure TanStack Query QueryClientProvider in app/layout.tsx with default staleTime: 30000
- Configure MUI ThemeProvider with dark/light mode toggle in app/layout.tsx
- Create lib/store.ts with Zustand stub for filter state: { sources: string[]
- Create types/job.ts mirroring backend Job model with all fields including embedding_status and saved
- npm run dev starts on port 3000 without errors
- No TypeScript errors on clean build
- MUI and Tailwind styles both apply without conflict
- output: 'standalone' is required — output: 'export' disables dynamic routes and is incompatible with this architecture
- MUI ThemeProvider must wrap the entire layout
JD-24b,App router page structure,Task,"Create all MVP 1 app/ pages and route layout following the proposal file tree.
- app/layout.tsx: root layout with QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, nav links to / | /saved | /applications | /recruiters
- app/page.tsx: dashboard — renders FilterBar + list of JobCard components
- app/onboarding/page.tsx: renders ProfileForm then CVUploadPanel in sequence

column2: renders job detail, Save/Unsave toggle, Generate Cover Letter button (disabled in MVP 1), Ask Question button (scrolls to panel), Generate Interview Prep button (disabled in MVP 1), Log Application button

column1: - app/applications/[id]/page.tsx: application detail with status transitions and notes
- app/admin/page.tsx: admin panel hidden behind feature_admin_panel flag
- app/cover-letter/[id]/page.tsx: Cover Letter viewer — renders CoverLetterViewer.tsx
- app/settings/consent/page.tsx: Consent dashboard to manage and revoke active 'living contracts' (stub for MVP 1)
- All routes render without runtime errors
- /onboarding flow transitions ProfileForm → CVUploadPanel → / on completion
- /jobs/[id] Generate buttons render disabled with tooltip in MVP 1
- /admin visible only in developer mode (feature_admin_panel flag = true)","frontend,nextjs,pages",JD-E4
JD-25,JobCard component,Task,"Create frontend/components/JobCard.tsx displaying job details with Save toggle and job detail navigation.
- Display: title (h3 linking to /jobs/{id} on click), company, location, source badge, salary_min/max, scraped_at
- Save toggle button: local state initialised from job.saved
column2: on toggle calls POST /api/v1/jobs/{id}/save or DELETE

column1: - On card title click: router.push('/jobs/' + job.id)
- Use MUI Card as container with hover elevation
- Save toggle updates immediately (optimistic) then confirms from server
- Long titles truncated at 2 lines with ellipsis (CSS line-clamp)","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-26,FilterBar component,Task,"Create frontend/components/FilterBar.tsx with source and keyword client-side filters backed by Zustand.
- Source filter: checkboxes for linkedin and jobserve
- Keyword filter: controlled text input with 300ms debounce using useEffect
- Read/write filter state from Zustand store (lib/store.ts)
- Clear all button resets both filters to defaults
- Keyword filter narrows JobCard list in real time with debounce
- Source checkboxes show/hide jobs by source
JD-27,ScrapeButton component,Task,"Create frontend/components/ScrapeButton.tsx triggering POST /api/v1/scrape with in-progress and result states.
- useMutation from TanStack Query for POST /api/v1/scrape
- Disable button while mutation is pending
- Pending state disables button and shows spinner
- Double-click prevented: button disabled during pending","frontend,components,api",JD-E4
JD-24c,OnboardingBanner component,Task,"Create frontend/components/OnboardingBanner.tsx that guides users through profile + CV setup using shared query keys.
- Fetch GET /api/v1/profile with TanStack Query key ['profile']
- Fetch GET /api/v1/cv/status with TanStack Query key ['cv-status']
- Query key contract: invalidate ['profile'] or ['cv-status'] on success
- Banner shows when profile is incomplete
- Banner updates to CV step after profile saved
- Banner must not flash on initial load","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-24d,ProfileForm and CVUploadPanel components,Task,"Create frontend/components/ProfileForm.tsx and frontend/components/CVUploadPanel.tsx.
- Fields: full_name, email, target_role, target_location, skills, years_experience
- Poll GET /api/v1/cv/status every 5s until embedding_status = ready
- ProfileForm Zod validation prevents submit with missing fields
- Form errors must be caught and shown as toast","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-24e,SavedJobsList and ApplicationBoard components,Task,"Create frontend/components/SavedJobsList.tsx and frontend/components/ApplicationBoard.tsx.
- Kanban-style columns, one per Application.status value
- ApplicationBoard renders correct number of columns
- Empty columns still render (no jobs in that status)","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-24f,RecruiterCard and AdminPanel components,Task,"Create frontend/components/RecruiterCard.tsx and frontend/components/AdminPanel.tsx.
- Display: name, company, email, interaction_score, notes
- AdminPanel must handle empty DLQ gracefully","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-24g,CoverLetterViewer component,Task,"Create frontend/components/CoverLetterViewer.tsx for polling, rendering, and downloading generated cover letters.
- On mount: GET /api/v1/cover-letter/{job_id} with TanStack Query
- Poll every 3s if status = pending or generating
- When ready: render cover letter content
- Two download buttons: 'Download PDF' and 'Download Markdown'
- Do not render download buttons while status is pending","frontend,components,ai",JD-E4
JD-24h,Q&A and Consent Modal Components,Task,"Create frontend/components/QuestionAnswerPanel.tsx and frontend/components/ConsentPromptModal.tsx stubs.
- Interface for user to type a question. Calls POST /api/v1/question-answer/{job_id}
- JIT prompting when an agent requires human-in-the-loop approval.
- QuestionAnswerPanel sends input and renders response.
- Both will be fully integrated in MVP 2 and MVP 3, so MVP 1 scope is basic scaffolding and stubs.","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-E5,Versioned API & CI Skeleton,Epic,"Implement the jobs router, admin process scripts, multi-stage Docker setup, and GitHub Actions CI skeleton using reusable workflow patterns.
JD-28,Jobs router,Task,"Create backend/routers/v1/jobs.py with paginated job listing, job detail, save/unsave, and saved jobs list endpoints.
- All endpoints use response_model= for OpenAPI generation
- GET /api/v1/jobs/saved route must be defined before /api/v1/jobs/{id}","backend,api,pagination",JD-E5
JD-28b,Profile and CV endpoints,Task,"Create backend/routers/v1/profile.py, cv.py, and feature_flags.py endpoints.
- GET /api/v1/feature-flags returns all flags false in MVP 1
- CV file size limit: reject files > 10MB","backend,api,profile",JD-E5
JD-29,OpenAPI spec completeness,Task,"Ensure all routes are fully typed with Pydantic request/response models and RFC 7807 error shapes.
- Standardise all error responses to RFC 7807 shape: {type, title, status, detail}
JD-30,Admin process scripts,Task,"Create backend/admin/ directory with seed_keywords.py, clear_db.py, run_evals.py, and replay_dlq.py stubs.
- seed_keywords.py: print each keyword from DEFAULT_KEYWORDS in filters.py
- run_evals.py: stub raising NotImplementedError('Implemented in MVP 1.1')
- replay_dlq.py: stub raising NotImplementedError('Implemented in MVP 2')
- Stub scripts exit 0 with informative log message
- clear_db.py must exit 1 if DATABASE_URL is set (prevent production run)","backend,admin,scripts",JD-E5
JD-31,GitHub Actions CI skeleton,Task,"Create .github/workflows/ci.yml using reusable workflow patterns with linting, type checking, tests, and Docker build.
- Trigger: on: pull_request and push to main
- Jobs: lint-and-type-check, test-backend, test-frontend, docker-build, check-workflow-docs
- All jobs trigger on PR and push to main
- Docker build uses GHA layer cache
- Playwright install NOT required in CI","cicd,github,infrastructure",JD-E5
JD-32,Docker and Nginx Multi-Stage Setup,Task,"Create Dockerfile, nginx.conf, and supervisord.conf for the MVP 1 single-container deployment.
- Stage 2: Install Python BE dependencies with uv
- Stage 3: Runtime image combining Nginx, FE server, BE server, and supervisord
- nginx.conf: Reverse proxy / to Next.js on port 3000, and /api to FastAPI on port 8000
- supervisord.conf: Manage uvicorn, Next.js server, and nginx processes (Factor IX Disposability)
- Nginx correctly routes traffic between frontend and backend
- All secrets must be injected at runtime via env vars, never baked into the image.","infrastructure,docker,nginx",JD-E5
JD-33,Applications endpoint,Task,"Create backend/routers/v1/applications.py for logging and tracking applications.
- GET /api/v1/applications: fetches user applications joined with Job details
- PATCH /api/v1/applications/{id}: updates application status (drag-drop) and notes
- GET returns applications mapped with job details
- Ensure uniqueness by job_id and user_id","backend,api,applications",JD-E5
